tasks.subject: Task 1: Widen AvbParse_HashDescriptor with optional salt + image_size outs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend `AvbParse_HashDescriptor` so it can return `salt`, `salt_len`, and `image_size` when the caller passes non-NULL pointers, matching the signature of the static helper in FastbootCmds.c that Task 2 will delete.

**Files:**
- Modify: `GblChainloadPkg/Include/Library/AvbParseLib.h:55`
- Modify: `GblChainloadPkg/Library/AvbParseLib/AvbParse.c:91-115`
- Modify: `tests/avb/test_avbparse.c:268, 331`
- Modify: `tests/avb/test_avbparse.c` (add 1 new test)
- Modify: `tools/vbmeta-graft/vbmeta-graft.c:185, 495`

**Verify:** `cd /home/vivy/gbl-chainload && make -C tests/avb && ./tests/avb/test_avbparse && make -C tools/vbmeta-graft`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["GblChainloadPkg/Include/Library/AvbParseLib.h", "GblChainloadPkg/Library/AvbParseLib/AvbParse.c", "tests/avb/test_avbparse.c", "tools/vbmeta-graft/vbmeta-graft.c"], "verifyCommand": "cd /home/vivy/gbl-chainload && make -C tests/avb && ./tests/avb/test_avbparse && make -C tools/vbmeta-graft && ./tools/vbmeta-graft/vbmeta-graft --help 2>&1 | head -5", "acceptanceCriteria": ["AvbParse_HashDescriptor accepts three trailing OPTIONAL outs (SaltOut, SaltLenOut, ImageSizeOut)", "NULL-passthrough leaves the other outputs unchanged", "Populated outs match the descriptor at offsets 16 / 60 / 132+name_len", "vbmeta-graft.c:185 and :495 compile passing NULL,NULL,NULL", "tests/avb/test_avbparse prints ALL PASS"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Wire FastbootLib → AvbParseLib (delete parallel parser)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make `AvbParseLib` the live on-device AVB parser by deleting the 4 file-local `STATIC AvbParse_*` helpers in `FastbootCmds.c` and routing the existing call sites through `AvbParseLib`. Net effect: ~100 LOC removed from the edk2 fork, libavb calls no longer reached from the fastboot vbmeta probe.

**Files:**
- Modify: `edk2/QcomModulePkg/Library/FastbootLib/FastbootLib.inf:143-152`
- Modify: `edk2/QcomModulePkg/Library/FastbootLib/FastbootCmds.c:133-136` (delete 4 forward decls)
- Modify: `edk2/QcomModulePkg/Library/FastbootLib/FastbootCmds.c:4630-4750` (delete 4 STATIC impls)
- Modify: `edk2/QcomModulePkg/Library/FastbootLib/FastbootCmds.c` near top (add include)

**Verify:** Build + on-device smoke. `grep -n 'STATIC EFI_STATUS AvbParse_' edk2/QcomModulePkg/Library/FastbootLib/FastbootCmds.c` must return empty.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["edk2/QcomModulePkg/Library/FastbootLib/FastbootLib.inf", "edk2/QcomModulePkg/Library/FastbootLib/FastbootCmds.c"], "verifyCommand": "cd /home/vivy/gbl-chainload && grep -n 'STATIC EFI_STATUS AvbParse_' edk2/QcomModulePkg/Library/FastbootLib/FastbootCmds.c; grep -n 'avb_vbmeta_image_verify\\|avb_descriptor_validate_and_byteswap\\|avb_hash_descriptor_validate_and_byteswap\\|avb_chain_partition_descriptor_validate_and_byteswap' edk2/QcomModulePkg/Library/FastbootLib/FastbootCmds.c", "acceptanceCriteria": ["FastbootLib.inf [LibraryClasses] gains AvbParseLib", "All 4 STATIC AvbParse_* impls and forward-decls deleted from FastbootCmds.c", "FastbootCmds.c includes <Library/AvbParseLib.h>", "grep for STATIC EFI_STATUS AvbParse_ in FastbootCmds.c returns empty", "grep for the 4 libavb call symbols in FastbootCmds.c returns empty", "EDK2 build completes for canoe and infiniti", "Fastboot menu AVB WARNING line on-device matches pre-change baseline"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Migrate mode2-profile.c (host) to AvbParseLib
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Delete ~80 LOC of duplicated AVB parsing in `tools/mode2-profile/mode2-profile.c` in favor of `AvbParse_VbmetaHeader` + `AvbParse_NextDescriptor` from AvbParseLib. TOML output must remain byte-identical to the pre-migration baseline.

**Files:**
- Modify: `tools/mode2-profile/Makefile`
- Modify: `tools/mode2-profile/mode2-profile.c`
- Create: `tools/mode2-profile/tests/regression-fixture.sh`

**Verify:** `cd /home/vivy/gbl-chainload/tools/mode2-profile && bash tests/regression-fixture.sh` → 'PASS: mode2-profile TOML output byte-identical to baseline'.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/mode2-profile/Makefile", "tools/mode2-profile/mode2-profile.c", "tools/mode2-profile/tests/regression-fixture.sh"], "verifyCommand": "cd /home/vivy/gbl-chainload/tools/mode2-profile && bash tests/regression-fixture.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["rbe64 and all AVB_*_OFF macros removed from mode2-profile.c", "mode2-profile.c uses AvbParse_VbmetaHeader and AvbParse_NextDescriptor", "Makefile builds native + android + windows + macos-x64 + macos-arm64 targets", "TOML output byte-identical to pre-migration baseline on a real fixture"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Cross-tree verification + audit closure
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Confirm no stragglers — no other code references the removed B implementations, no other host tool reinvents AVB parsing. Open PR.

**Verify:** All four grep audits return expected output (3 empty, 1 limited to libavb tree); all host tests pass; on-device evidence captured in PR.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "cd /home/vivy/gbl-chainload && grep -rn 'rbe64\\|put_u64_be\\|put_u32_be' tools/ tests/avb/; grep -rn 'AVB_HDR_SIZE\\|AVB_AUTH_SIZE_OFF\\|AVB_AUX_SIZE_OFF\\|AVB_PK_OFF_OFF\\|AVB_PK_SIZE_OFF\\|AVB_DESC_OFF_OFF\\|AVB_DESC_SIZE_OFF' tools/; grep -rn 'STATIC EFI_STATUS AvbParse_' edk2/QcomModulePkg/; grep -rn 'avb_vbmeta_image_verify' edk2/QcomModulePkg/ | grep -v 'Library/avb/libavb/'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["No literal AVB offsets remain in tools/", "No STATIC AvbParse_ remain in edk2/QcomModulePkg/", "No external consumer of avb_vbmeta_image_verify outside libavb tree", "All host tests pass: test_avbparse, vbmeta-graft, mode2-profile regression", "On-device fastboot menu + oem vbmeta-status match pre-change baseline", "PR opened against main with structured body"]}
```
